file: 1342_Hanaoka 等 - 2015 - Jet fuel synthesis in hydrocracking of Fischer–Tropsch product over Pt-loaded zeolite catalysts prep.txt

experiments.description: 使用不同Pt/沸石催化剂，在250°C、1 MPa初始H₂压力下，对模型化合物n-C₂₈H₅₈（二十八烷）进行1小时的加氢裂化筛选实验。
experiments.text_snippet: First, a screening study was performed to determine the hydrocracking performance on n-C28H58 and n-C36H74 of various Pt-loaded zeolite catalysts prepared using an impregnation method... Hydrocracking tests were performed... Temperatures and inner pressures were recorded... The hydrocracking reaction started when the temperature reached 250°C. The reaction time was 1 h.

experiments.description: 使用不同Pt/沸石催化剂，在250°C、1 MPa初始H₂压力下，对模型化合物n-C₃₆H₇₄（三十六烷）进行1小时的加氢裂化筛选实验。
experiments.text_snippet: First, a screening study was performed to determine the hydrocracking performance on n-C28H58 and n-C36H74 of various Pt-loaded zeolite catalysts prepared using an impregnation method... Hydrocracking tests were performed... Temperatures and inner pressures were recorded... The hydrocracking reaction started when the temperature reached 250°C. The reaction time was 1 h.

Catalyst composition.original: Pt (0.1 wt.%) on various zeolite supports (β-type, mordenite-type, Y-type)

Conversion rate.original: Reported for specific catalysts and feedstocks (e.g., 84.3% for n-C₂₈H₅₈ over Cat. K, 99.1% for n-C₃₆H₇₄ over Cat. K)

Product yield.original: Reported as C-mol% for various product ranges (e.g., 29.1 C-mol% jet fuel yield maximum)

Product Selectivity.value: Not explicitly reported as selectivity, but yields for specific carbon ranges are provided
Product Selectivity.original: Not explicitly reported as selectivity, but yields for specific carbon ranges are provided
